generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor mounted on the Physical Twin collecting speed data over time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmit
]

instance VehicleTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle temperature sensor mounted on the Physical Twin collecting cabin temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleTemperatureDataTransmit
]

instance VehiclePressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle pressure sensor mounted on the Physical Twin recording tire inflation pressure."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehiclePressureDataTransmit
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmit : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleTemperatureDataTransmit : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleTemperatureSensor
]

instance VehiclePressureDataTransmit : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehiclePressureSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance VehicleCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the vehicle geometry, including wheel sizes, chassis shape and styling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance VehicleBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equation model capturing vehicle dynamic behaviour."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance VehicleAnalyticKnowledge : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical knowledge base of the cyber‑physical system and its surrounding environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance VehicleSpeedTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of vehicle speed measurements from the speed sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, MonitoringEngine, PredictiveSimulationAlgorithm
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmit
]

instance VehicleTemperatureTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of cabin temperature measurements from the temperature sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, MonitoringEngine, PredictiveSimulationAlgorithm
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleTemperatureDataTransmit
]

instance VehiclePressureTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of tire pressure measurements from the pressure sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, MonitoringEngine, PredictiveSimulationAlgorithm
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehiclePressureDataTransmit
]

// C11: Enablers
instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm refining model parameters based on live sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm identifying anomalies in sensor data and model predictions."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller executing high‑level control strategies derived from state estimates."
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation routine fusing noisy sensor data to derive accurate vehicle states."
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithm adjusting operating parameters to improve performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring engine analysing model outputs and sensor data to verify safety and performance."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation routine generating forecasts of future vehicle behaviour."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

// C6: Services
instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that applies updated model parameters to the behavior and analytics models."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedModelInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that reports detected faults and triggers corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, AutomaticCorrectiveAction
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that dispatches supervisory control commands to actuators."
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryCommandInsight, SupervisoryCommandAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that delivers refined state estimates to other components."
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal operating points and control actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalOperatingPointInsight, OptimizedControlAction
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that verifies safety constraints and overall system health."
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitorInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates future behaviour forecasts for proactive planning."
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance UpdatedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that the behavior model has been updated with new parameters."
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying an anomaly in vehicle operation detected by fault detection."
]

instance AutomaticCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic corrective action forwarding to actuators to mitigate detected fault."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SupervisoryCommandInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarising supervisory control decision for a given operating condition."
]

instance SupervisoryCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action issued by supervisory controller to adjust vehicle trajectory."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance StateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight containing the fused state estimate of vehicle dynamics."
]

instance OptimalOperatingPointInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight proposing the optimal operating point for energy efficiency."
]

instance OptimizedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimized control command computed by the optimisation algorithm."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyMonitorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming that the vehicle remains within safety limits."
]

instance ForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing predicted vehicle behaviour over the next time horizon."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Development: models (e.g., CAD for static geometry and dynamic differential‑equation models) are built to understand specific aspects of the system. Deployment: these models are retained and integrated into a Digital Twin framework. Representation: static CAD structures, dynamic simulation models, and parameterised models are utilised. Transition: calibration algorithms adjust model parameters based on sensor data collected from the Physical Twin, aligning the digital representation with reality. Lifecycle governance: safety monitors evaluate model outputs against operational thresholds; violations trigger human or algorithmic intervention, forming an implicit governance loop."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs calibration algorithms to adjust model parameters based on collected data, suggesting a continuous model‑validation loop. However, explicit fidelity requirements, validation and verification procedures, uncertainty sources, error detection and correction mechanisms, or quality assurance processes for models and data are not detailed in the document."
]
